title: Puff-o-blocks
body:
Adds several useless blocks

- Block of Pufferfish
- Pufferfish Slab
- Pufferfish Stair
- Pufferfish Wall
- Pufferfish Fence
- Pufferfish Fence Gate
- Block of Cooked Cod
- Cooked Cod Slab
- Cooked Cod Stairs

Aswell as two equally as stupid items

- Pufferfluid Bucket
- Pufferfish Ingot


In otherwords this mod is a complete joke and you are actually insane if you even think about using this mod.
